example:
User: liệt kê tất cả phòng trên tầng 1
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Rooms", "level": "Level 1"}}
</tool_call>

User: list all doors
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Doors"}}
</tool_call>

User: show walls on Level 2
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Walls", "level": "Level 2"}}
</tool_call>

User: how many walls in the model?
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "count_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Walls"}}
</tool_call>

User: có bao nhiêu ống trong mô hình?
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "count_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts"}}
</tool_call>

User: count pipes on Level 1
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "count_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Pipes", "level": "Level 1"}}
</tool_call>

User: show parameters of element 12345
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_element_parameters", "arguments": {"element_id": 12345}}
</tool_call>

User: xem tham số element 99999
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_element_parameters", "arguments": {"element_id": 99999}}
</tool_call>

User: tìm tất cả tường có vật liệu Concrete
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "search_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Walls", "param_name": "Material", "param_value": "Concrete"}}
</tool_call>

User: find ducts with Mark = SA-01
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "search_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts", "param_name": "Mark", "param_value": "SA-01", "match_type": "equals"}}
</tool_call>

User: Liệt tất cả các element có category là Doors và có biến Width nhỏ hơn 1500. phân loại theo level và family name
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "search_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Doors", "param_name": "Width", "param_value": "1500", "match_type": "less", "group_by": ["level", "family"]}}
</tool_call>

User: find all pipes with Diameter greater than 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "search_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Pipes", "param_name": "Diameter", "param_value": "200", "match_type": "greater"}}
</tool_call>

User: tìm tất cả duct có biến Width bé hơn 300, nhóm theo level
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "search_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts", "param_name": "Width", "param_value": "300", "match_type": "less", "group_by": ["level"]}}
</tool_call>

User: thông tin dự án
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_project_info", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: show project info
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_project_info", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: show me all levels with elevations
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_levels_detailed", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: liệt kê level và cao độ
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_levels_detailed", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: list all categories
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_categories", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: liệt kê danh mục trong model
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_categories", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: what view am I on?
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_current_view", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: show current active view
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_current_view", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: list all rooms
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_rooms", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: phòng trên tầng 3
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_rooms", "arguments": {"level": "Level 3"}}
</tool_call>

User: get data from schedule Pipe Schedule
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_schedule_data", "arguments": {"schedule_name": "Pipe Schedule"}}
</tool_call>

User: đọc dữ liệu schedule Duct Schedule
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_schedule_data", "arguments": {"schedule_name": "Duct Schedule"}}
</tool_call>

User: set Mark parameter of element 999 to "ABC"
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "set_parameter_value", "arguments": {"element_ids": [999], "param_name": "Mark", "value": "ABC"}}
</tool_call>

User: set Comments for elements 100,200 to "Checked"
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "set_parameter_value", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "param_name": "Comments", "value": "Checked"}}
</tool_call>

User: delete elements 111, 222, 333
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "delete_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [111, 222, 333]}}
</tool_call>

User: remove element 500
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "delete_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [500]}}
</tool_call>

User: select elements 100, 200, 300
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "select_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200, 300]}}
</tool_call>

User: highlight element 55555
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "select_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [55555]}}
</tool_call>

User: rename element 999 to 'Final'
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "rename_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [999], "new_name": "Final"}}
</tool_call>

User: rename views 100,200 to Mechanical Plan
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "rename_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "new_name": "Mechanical Plan"}}
</tool_call>

User: copy elements 100, 200 by offset (3, 0, 0) feet
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "copy_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "offset_x": 3.0, "offset_y": 0, "offset_z": 0}}
</tool_call>

User: move element 300 by offset (2, 0, 0) feet
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "move_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [300], "offset_x": 2.0, "offset_y": 0, "offset_z": 0}}
</tool_call>

User: mirror elements 100,200 along X axis
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "mirror_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "axis": "X"}}
</tool_call>

User: duplicate views 12345 and 67890
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "duplicate_views", "arguments": {"view_ids": [12345, 67890]}}
</tool_call>

User: duplicate sheets 100, 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "duplicate_sheets", "arguments": {"sheet_ids": [100, 200]}}
</tool_call>

User: export all walls to CSV
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "export_to_csv", "arguments": {"category": "Walls", "param_names": ["Mark", "Type Name", "Length"], "file_path": "C:\\temp\\walls.csv"}}
</tool_call>

User: export pipes to CSV with size and length
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "export_to_csv", "arguments": {"category": "Pipes", "param_names": ["System Name", "Size", "Length"], "file_path": "C:\\temp\\pipes.csv"}}
</tool_call>

User: đổi màu tất cả duct sang đỏ
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "override_category_color", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts", "color": "Red"}}
</tool_call>

User: change color of element 54321 to blue
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "override_element_color", "arguments": {"element_ids": [54321], "color": "Blue"}}
</tool_call>

User: color all elements on Level 1 green
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "override_color_by_level", "arguments": {"level_name": "Level 1", "color": "Green"}}
</tool_call>

User: color all Ducts on Level 2 yellow
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "override_color_by_filter", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts", "level_name": "Level 2", "color": "Yellow"}}
</tool_call>

User: reset color overrides for elements 100,200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "reset_element_overrides", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200]}}
</tool_call>

User: set transparency of elements 100, 200 to 50%
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "set_element_transparency", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "transparency": 50}}
</tool_call>

User: hide elements 100, 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "hide_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200]}}
</tool_call>

User: ẩn tất cả pipe trong view hiện tại
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "hide_category", "arguments": {"category": "Pipes"}}
</tool_call>

User: hide all on Level B1
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "hide_by_level", "arguments": {"level_name": "Level B1"}}
</tool_call>

User: unhide elements 100, 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "unhide_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200]}}
</tool_call>

User: unhide Pipes category
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "unhide_category", "arguments": {"category": "Pipes"}}
</tool_call>

User: isolate elements 100,200,300
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "isolate_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200, 300]}}
</tool_call>

User: cô lập tất cả duct
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "isolate_category", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts"}}
</tool_call>

User: isolate all elements on Level 01
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "isolate_by_level", "arguments": {"level_name": "Level 01"}}
</tool_call>

User: isolate Walls on Level 1
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "isolate_by_filter", "arguments": {"category": "Walls", "level_name": "Level 1"}}
</tool_call>

User: tạo một 3D view tên là Overview_3D
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_3d_view", "arguments": {"view_name": "Overview_3D"}}
</tool_call>

User: create a 3D view showing only Ducts on Level 1, name it 3D_Ducts_L1
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_3d_view", "arguments": {"view_name": "3D_Ducts_L1", "category": "Ducts", "level_name": "Level 1"}}
</tool_call>

User: Tạo một 3D view trong đó chỉ thể hiện các element có system chứa Supply Air. 3D view được đặt tên là 3DView_System_SupplyAir
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_3d_view_by_system", "arguments": {"system_name": "Supply Air", "view_name": "3DView_System_SupplyAir", "match_type": "contains"}}
</tool_call>

User: create 3D view for Chilled Water Return system, name 3D_CHW_Return
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_3d_view_by_system", "arguments": {"system_name": "Chilled Water Return", "view_name": "3D_CHW_Return", "match_type": "contains"}}
</tool_call>

User: tạo 3d view chỉ hiện hệ thống Exhaust, đặt tên 3D_Exhaust
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_3d_view_by_system", "arguments": {"system_name": "Exhaust", "view_name": "3D_Exhaust"}}
</tool_call>

User: hiện lại tất cả element đã ẩn
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "reset_view_isolation", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: which elements are hidden?
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_hidden_elements", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: what is currently selected?
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_current_selection", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: zoom to elements 100, 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "zoom_to_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200]}}
</tool_call>

User: select all walls where Mark contains ABC
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "select_by_parameter_value", "arguments": {"category": "Walls", "parameter_name": "Mark", "value": "ABC", "match_type": "contains"}}
</tool_call>

User: chọn tất cả pipe có Diameter nhỏ hơn 50
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "select_by_parameter_value", "arguments": {"category": "Pipes", "parameter_name": "Diameter", "value": "50", "match_type": "less"}}
</tool_call>

User: select elements in bounding box
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "select_by_bounding_box", "arguments": {"min_x": 0, "min_y": 0, "min_z": 0, "max_x": 100, "max_y": 100, "max_z": 50}}
</tool_call>

User: select all ducts in current view
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "select_elements_in_view", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts"}}
</tool_call>

User: summarize current selection
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_selection_summary", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: liệt kê tất cả sheet
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_sheets_summary", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: create sheet A101 named Floor Plan
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_sheet", "arguments": {"sheet_number": "A101", "sheet_name": "Floor Plan"}}
</tool_call>

User: place view 12345 on sheet 67890
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "place_view_on_sheet", "arguments": {"sheet_id": 67890, "view_id": 12345}}
</tool_call>

User: get viewports on sheet 67890
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_sheet_viewports", "arguments": {"sheet_id": 67890}}
</tool_call>

User: remove viewport 12345 from sheet
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "remove_viewport", "arguments": {"viewport_id": 12345}}
</tool_call>

User: list all view filters
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_view_filters", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: list all view templates
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_view_templates", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: apply view template 5678 to views 100,200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "apply_view_template", "arguments": {"view_ids": [100, 200], "template_id": 5678}}
</tool_call>

User: create a filter for Ducts where System Name equals Supply
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_parameter_filter", "arguments": {"filter_name": "Supply Ducts", "categories": ["Ducts"], "parameter_name": "System Name", "rule_type": "equals", "value": "Supply"}}
</tool_call>

User: show rules for filter 9876
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_filter_rules", "arguments": {"filter_id": 9876}}
</tool_call>

User: liệt kê tất cả family type của Door
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_family_types", "arguments": {"category": "Doors"}}
</tool_call>

User: place family instance at (10, 20, 0)
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "place_family_instance", "arguments": {"family_type_id": 12345, "x": 10, "y": 20, "z": 0}}
</tool_call>

User: swap type of element 100 to type 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "swap_family_type", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100], "new_type_id": 200}}
</tool_call>

User: load family from C:\Families\MyFamily.rfa
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "load_family", "arguments": {"file_path": "C:\\Families\\MyFamily.rfa"}}
</tool_call>

User: liệt kê tất cả vật liệu
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_materials", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: what material is element 100?
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_element_material", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100]}}
</tool_call>

User: set material of elements 100,200 to material 5678
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "set_element_material", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "material_id": 5678}}
</tool_call>

User: get material quantities for walls
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_material_quantities", "arguments": {"category": "Walls"}}
</tool_call>

User: list all worksets
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_worksets", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: move elements 100,200 to workset MEP
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "move_to_workset", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200], "workset_name": "MEP"}}
</tool_call>

User: list all phases
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_phases", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: get elements in phase New Construction
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_elements_by_phase", "arguments": {"phase_name": "New Construction"}}
</tool_call>

User: set phase of element 100 to Existing
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "set_phase", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100], "phase_name": "Existing"}}
</tool_call>

User: find untagged doors in current view
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_untagged_elements", "arguments": {"category": "Doors"}}
</tool_call>

User: tag elements 100, 200
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "tag_elements", "arguments": {"element_ids": [100, 200]}}
</tool_call>

User: tag all ducts in current view
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "tag_all_in_view", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts"}}
</tool_call>

User: add text note "Check this" at x=10 y=5
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "add_text_note", "arguments": {"text": "Check this", "x": 10, "y": 5}}
</tool_call>

User: tạo schedule cho Ducts gồm System Name, Size, Length, Level
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_schedule", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts", "field_names": ["System Name", "Size", "Length", "Level"]}}
</tool_call>

User: list available schedule fields for Ducts
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_schedule_fields", "arguments": {"category": "Ducts"}}
</tool_call>

User: show all grids
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "get_grids", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: check grid alignment
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "check_grid_alignment", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

User: create a grid named A from (0,0) to (0,100)
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_grid", "arguments": {"name": "A", "start_x": 0, "start_y": 0, "end_x": 0, "end_y": 100}}
</tool_call>

User: create a new level at elevation 4000mm named Level 5
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "create_level", "arguments": {"name": "Level 5", "elevation": 4000, "unit": "mm"}}
</tool_call>

User: duplicate levels with +500mm offset and _add suffix
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "duplicate_levels_offset", "arguments": {"offset_mm": 500, "suffix": "_add"}}
</tool_call>

User: rename level 12345 to Ground Floor
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "rename_level", "arguments": {"level_id": 12345, "new_name": "Ground Floor"}}
</tool_call>

User: delete level 12345
Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "delete_levels", "arguments": {"level_ids": [12345]}}

Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "check_level_consistency", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "find_off_axis_elements", "arguments": {}}
</tool_call>

{"name": "get_groups", "arguments": {}}

{"name": "ungroup", "arguments": {"group_ids": [12345, 67890]}}

{"name": "get_group_members", "arguments": {"group_id": 12345}}

{"name": "place_group_instance", "arguments": {"group_type_id": 12345, "x": 10, "y": 20, "z": 0}}

{"name": "get_sheets_by_revision", "arguments": {"revision_id": 1234}}

{"name": "get_mep_systems", "arguments": {}}

{"name": "get_system_elements", "arguments": {"system_name": "Supply Air 1"}}

{"name": "get_duct_summary", "arguments": {}}

Assistant:
<tool_call>
{"name": "calculate_system_totals", "arguments": {}}

User: tổng theo hệ thống cho Supply Air
Assistant:
